resignation_approve_date.text: วันที่บันทึก

RESIGN_DOC_NO.text: เลขที่คำขอ

root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.MEMBERSHIP_NO ,sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.RESIGN_DATE ,sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_code ,sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_name ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.MEMBERSHIP_NO) as memname ,pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth, localtimestamp) as agetext ,SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED.MEMBER_GROUP_NO ,SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP.MEMBER_GROUP_NAME ,sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.REMARK ,sc_mem_m_resign_share.SHR_VALUE ,sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.DIFFERENT_SHARELOAN
, CASE WHEN DIFFERENT_SHARELOAN < 0 THEN abs(different_shareloan) ELSE 0 END as DIFFERENT_loan
, CASE WHEN DIFFERENT_SHARELOAN > 0 THEN abs(different_shareloan) ELSE 0 END as DIFFERENT_share
,sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.RESIGN_DOC_NO ,sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.RESIGN_CODE ,SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED.RESIGNATION_APPROVE_DATE ,SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP.KEEPING_GROUP ,SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED.mem_type ,SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED.sex ,coalesce(( SELECT sum(coalesce(SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.item_amount, 0)) FROM SC_COM_M_RECEIPT ,SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM ,sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type WHERE (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.receipt_no = SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.receipt_no) and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.item_type_id AND ( (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.membership_no = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.MEMBERSHIP_NO) AND (sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'ISR') AND (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.receipt_status = '0') AND (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.MONEY_TYPE_ID = 'TNL') ) ), 0) AS pay_ment_insu ,coalesce(( SELECT sum(SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.principal_amount) FROM SC_COM_M_RECEIPT ,SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM ,SC_LON_M_RULE WHERE (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.receipt_no = SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.receipt_no) AND (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.loan_type = SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_type) AND ( (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.membership_no = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.MEMBERSHIP_NO) AND (SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_group_code = '01') AND (sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = 'TNL') AND (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.item_type_id = 'PL') AND (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.receipt_status = '0') ) ), 0) AS pay_prin_emer ,coalesce(( SELECT sum(SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.interest_amount) FROM SC_COM_M_RECEIPT ,SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM ,SC_LON_M_RULE WHERE (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.receipt_no = SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.receipt_no) AND (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.loan_type = SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_type) AND ( (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.membership_no = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.MEMBERSHIP_NO) AND (SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_group_code = '01') AND (sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = 'TNL') AND (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.item_type_id = 'PL') AND (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.receipt_status = '0') ) ), 0) AS pay_int_emer /* ------------------ Norm ------------- */ ,coalesce(( SELECT sum(SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.principal_amount) FROM SC_COM_M_RECEIPT ,SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM ,SC_LON_M_RULE WHERE (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.receipt_no = SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.receipt_no) AND (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.loan_type = SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_type) AND ( (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.membership_no = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.MEMBERSHIP_NO) AND (SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_group_code = '02') AND (sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = 'TNL') AND (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.item_type_id = 'PL') AND (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.receipt_status = '0') ) ), 0) AS pay_prin_norm ,coalesce(( SELECT sum(SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.interest_amount) FROM SC_COM_M_RECEIPT ,SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM ,SC_LON_M_RULE WHERE (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.receipt_no = SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.receipt_no) AND (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.loan_type = SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_type) AND ( (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.membership_no = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.MEMBERSHIP_NO) AND (SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_group_code = '02') AND (sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = 'TNL') AND (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.item_type_id = 'PL') AND (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.receipt_status = '0') ) ), 0) AS pay_int_norm /* ------------------ Special ------------- */ ,coalesce(( SELECT sum(SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.principal_amount) FROM SC_COM_M_RECEIPT ,SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM ,SC_LON_M_RULE WHERE (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.receipt_no = SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.receipt_no) AND (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.loan_type = SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_type) AND ( (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.membership_no = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.MEMBERSHIP_NO) AND (SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_group_code = '03') AND (sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = 'TNL') AND (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.item_type_id = 'PL') AND (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.receipt_status = '0') ) ), 0) AS pay_prin_spec ,coalesce(( SELECT sum(SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.interest_amount) FROM SC_COM_M_RECEIPT ,SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM ,SC_LON_M_RULE WHERE (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.receipt_no = SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.receipt_no) AND (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.loan_type = SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_type) AND ( (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.membership_no = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.MEMBERSHIP_NO) AND (SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_group_code = '03') AND (sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = 'TNL') AND (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.item_type_id = 'PL') AND (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.receipt_status = '0') ) ), 0) AS pay_int_spec ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control ,pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control) as member_control_name
,coalesce((select sc_com_m_receipt.money_trans_amount from sc_com_m_receipt where 1=1 and sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = 'TNL' and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' and sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no),0)as money_trans_amount
,(select sc_mem_m_member_member_refer.membership_no_ref from sc_mem_m_member_member_refer where SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_member_refer.membership_no and sc_mem_m_member_member_refer.membership_no_ref like '02%') as membership_no_ref
,(select pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(trim(sc_mem_m_member_member_refer.membership_no_ref)) from sc_mem_m_member_member_refer where SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_member_refer.membership_no and sc_mem_m_member_member_refer.membership_no_ref like '02%') as ref_name
,( SELECT sum(SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.balance) FROM SC_COM_M_RECEIPT ,SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM WHERE (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.receipt_no = SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.receipt_no) AND ( (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.membership_no = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.MEMBERSHIP_NO) AND (sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = 'TNL') AND (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.item_type_id = 'PL') AND (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.receipt_status = '0') ) ) AS sumprincipalbalance
FROM sc_mem_m_resign_requestment ,sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause ,SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED ,SC_MEM_M_UCF_PRENAME ,SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP ,sc_mem_m_resign_share WHERE (sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.RESIGN_CODE = sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_code) AND (sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.MEMBERSHIP_NO = SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED.MEMBERSHIP_NO) AND (SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED.PRENAME_CODE = SC_MEM_M_UCF_PRENAME.PRENAME_CODE) AND (SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED.MEMBER_GROUP_NO = SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP.MEMBER_GROUP_NO) AND (sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.RESIGN_DOC_NO = sc_mem_m_resign_share.RESIGN_DOC_NO) AND (sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.approve_result <> '0') and sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.cancel_status <> '1' -- and sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.MEMBERSHIP_NO = '019572' /*WHERE*/ --and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.resignation_approve_date between to_date('01/08/2025','dd/mm/yyyy') and to_date('29/08/2025','dd/mm/yyyy') )
order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.MEMBERSHIP_NO asc

r_tnma_member_resign_renew_nest_isr2.sql: SELECT SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.description, SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.item_amount FROM SC_COM_M_RECEIPT, SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type WHERE ( SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.receipt_no = SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.receipt_no ) and ( SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) AND (sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'ISR') and ( SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.receipt_status = '0' ) AND ( SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.MONEY_TYPE_ID = 'TNL' ) and SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.item_amount >0 and ( SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.membership_no ={0} ) order by SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.description

r_tnma_member_resign_renew_nest_lonem.sql: SELECT SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_group_code ,sum(SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.principal_amount) AS c_bal ,sum(SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.interest_amount) AS c_int ,SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_type FROM SC_COM_M_RECEIPT ,SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM ,SC_LON_M_RULE WHERE (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.receipt_no = SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.receipt_no) AND (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.loan_type = SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_type) AND (SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_group_code = '01') AND (sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = 'TNL') AND (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.receipt_status = '0') and ( SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.membership_no = {0}) GROUP BY SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_group_code ,SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_type

r_tnma_member_resign_renew_nest_lonnm.sql: SELECT SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_group_code ,sum(SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.principal_amount) AS c_bal ,sum(SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.interest_amount) AS c_int ,SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_type FROM SC_COM_M_RECEIPT ,SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM ,SC_LON_M_RULE WHERE (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.receipt_no = SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.receipt_no) AND (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.loan_type = SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_type) AND (SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_group_code = '02') AND (sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = 'TNL') AND (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.receipt_status = '0') and ( SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.membership_no = {0}) GROUP BY SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_group_code ,SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_type

r_tnma_member_resign_renew_nest_lonsp.sql: SELECT SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_group_code ,sum(SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.principal_amount) AS c_bal ,sum(SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.interest_amount) AS c_int ,SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_type FROM SC_COM_M_RECEIPT ,SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM ,SC_LON_M_RULE WHERE (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.receipt_no = SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.receipt_no) AND (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.loan_type = SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_type) AND (SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_group_code = '03') AND (sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = 'TNL') AND (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.receipt_status = '0') and ( SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.membership_no = {0}) GROUP BY SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_group_code ,SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_type

r_tnma_member_resign_renew_nest_loncoll.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no ,sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type ,sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no ,sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance ,PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no) AS membername FROM sc_lon_m_contract_coll ,sc_lon_m_loan_card WHERE (sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no) AND (sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ={0}) AND (sc_lon_m_contract_coll.STATUS = '0') AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 OR sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no IN ( SELECT sc_atm_lon_card.loan_contract_no FROM sc_atm_lon_card WHERE sc_atm_lon_card.modify_status <> 'C' ) ) ORDER BY sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no ASC

r_tnma_member_resign_renew_nest_lonallne.sql:
SELECT SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_group_code ,sum(SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.principal_amount) AS c_bal ,sum(SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.interest_amount) AS c_int ,SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_type FROM SC_COM_M_RECEIPT ,SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM ,SC_LON_M_RULE ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group WHERE (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.receipt_no = SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.receipt_no) AND (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.loan_type = SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_type) AND (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) AND (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no) AND ( SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.receipt_date between '!resignation_approve_date_1!' and '!resignation_approve_date_2!' ) AND (sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = 'TNL') AND (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT.receipt_status = '0') AND (SC_COM_M_RECEIPT_ITEM.item_amount > 0)
GROUP BY SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_group_code ,SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_type order by SC_LON_M_RULE.loan_group_code asc

r_tnma_member_resign_renew_nest_memref.sql: select sc_mem_m_member_member_refer.membership_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_member_member_refer.membership_no) as mem_name from sc_mem_m_resign_requestment left join sc_mem_m_member_member_refer on sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_member_refer.membership_no_ref where ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no = {0})
